# QuickSecure

> QuickSecure is a unified K-12 school safety platform that combines emergency response, daily operations, hardware, and integrations into one system. QuickSecure serves K-12 schools with products that streamline emergency workflows, campus monitoring, anonymous reporting, and compliance management.

## Products

- [QuickSecure Panic](https://quicksecure.us/product/emergency-response): Mobile panic button app with direct-to-dispatch via RapidSOS, structured emergency workflows, real-time GPS tracking, and two-way communication. Helps schools comply with Alyssa's Law.
- [QuickSecure Nexus](https://quicksecure.us/product/campus-monitoring): Unified web dashboard for campus monitoring, lock status, camera feeds, access control, and SIS integrations (PowerSchool, FACTS, Veracross).
- [RLS Hardware](https://quicksecure.us): Physical room lockdown system providing hardware-based emergency response capabilities for classrooms and campus buildings.

## Modules

- [Anonymous Tip Line](https://quicksecure.us/product/tip-line): AI-triaged reporting with multilingual support and tiered escalation for student safety concerns.
- [Mass Notifications](https://quicksecure.us): Multi-channel alert system (push, SMS, email, in-app) integrated with emergency response workflows.
- [SOP Management](https://quicksecure.us): Standard Operating Procedure management for emergency and daily operational workflows.
- [Asset Management](https://quicksecure.us): Track and manage school safety equipment, AEDs, fire extinguishers, and security hardware.
- [Ticketing](https://quicksecure.us): Facility and safety ticketing system for maintenance requests and incident tracking.
- [Drill Management](https://quicksecure.us/product/drill-management): Plan, execute, and document safety drills using the same workflows as real emergencies. Includes drill compliance tracking.

## Company Information

- Website: https://quicksecure.us
- Contact: https://quicksecure.us/contact
- Blog: https://quicksecure.us/blog
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/quicksecurellc
- Legal & Privacy: https://quicksecure.us/legal

## Compliance & Security

QuickSecure is FERPA-aligned, operating as a "school official" under FERPA. The platform uses role-based access controls, encryption at rest and in transit (PostgreSQL + TLS), comprehensive audit logging, and data minimization practices.
